format.raw: InfosecFW1 NetScreen deviceid=InfosecFW1 Root:system-notification-00257(traffic) starttime="$DATE" duration=$DURATION policyid=$POLICY_ID service=icmp proto=1 src zone=Trust dst zone=Untrust action=$ACTION sent=102 rcvd=102 src=$SRC_IP dst=$DST_IP icmp type=0 icmp code=0 src-xlated ip=$SRC_IP dst-xlated ip=$DST_IP sessionid=$CONN_ID reason=Close - RESP

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value" arr_length="17">
    <Field position="0"  name="reason" />
    <Field position="1"  name="code" />
    <Field position="2"  name="device_id" />
    <Field position="3"  name="policyid" />
    <Field position="4"  name="dstn_ip"       org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="5"  name="src_ip"        org_name="src" />
    <Field position="6"  name="ip" />
    <Field position="7"  name="session_id" />
    <Field position="8"  name="rcvd" />
    <Field position="9"  name="type" />
    <Field position="10" name="sent" />
    <Field position="11" name="duration" />
    <Field position="12" name="start_time" />
    <Field position="13" name="zone" />
    <Field position="14" name="service" />
    <Field position="15" name="prtc"          org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="16" name="action" />
    <Field position="17" name="logtype"       convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="vendor"        convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="eqp_type"      convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="original_log"  convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="22" name="parser_info"   convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_netscreen_traffic_v2_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
